# pen-todo

> own course

HAXcms is a file-based CMS: authored pages and metadata are stored as portable files, not locked into a database-only workflow.
The canonical site structure is `site.json`, represented in JSON Outline Schema (`id`, `parent`, `order`, `slug`, `location`, and `metadata`).
Use HAX CLI and ecosystem tooling to maintain human-authored content while keeping machine-readable outputs synchronized.
Managed files (feeds, search indexes, manifests, and this `llms.txt`) are generated artifacts and should be rebuilt by tooling.

## Core resources
- [site.json](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/site.json): Canonical site manifest and navigation tree in JSON Outline Schema format.
- [llms.txt](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/llms.txt): LLM-oriented guide to this site and its machine-readable resources.

## Pages
- [Syllabus](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-course-syllabus/index.md): Course Syllabus Outline the course description, learning objectives, required materials, grading breakdown, and major deadlines. Keep this page focused on the big picture of what learners will accomp
- [Lesson 1](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1/index.md)
- [Lesson 1: Content](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1-content/index.md): Lesson 1 Content Organize the main instructional materials for Lesson 1 here. Combine text, media, and interactive elements to guide learners through concepts, examples, and practice opportunitie
- [New Page](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-88892e53-0178-4d1a-9d05-793ec6d783bb/index.md): llklk Link to content
- [Lesson 1: Conclusion](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1-conclusion/index.md): Lesson 1 Conclusion Wrap up Lesson 1 by revisiting the learning objectives, summarizing key takeaways, and pointing learners toward next steps such as reflections, assessments, or the next lesson.
- [Halaman Tes](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-53184bd3-b1bd-4b95-a01a-b460db2b8add/index.md): dsafdsa tess

## Optional
- [Search index](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/lunrSearchIndex.json): Lunr corpus for quick full-text retrieval.
- [RSS feed](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/rss.xml): Site updates in RSS format.
- [Atom feed](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/atom.xml): Site updates in Atom format.
- [Sitemap](https://localhost:3000/sites/pen-todo/sitemap.xml): URL-level discovery map for the published site.
